name: Lemon Cream Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or butter them.
3. Toast the almonds in the preheated oven for about 4 minutes, or until they are crisp and lightly colored. Set aside to cool.
4. Place sugar in a food processor fitted with a steel blade.
5. Remove zest from lemons using a citrus zester.
6. Process the lemon zest and sugar until the zest is finely grated (about 1 minute).
7. Add brown sugar, eggs, and cream to the food processor. Process until well mixed (30-45 seconds).
8. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter onto the prepared cookie sheets, leaving about 1 1/2 inches between each cookie.
9. Sprinkle the top of each cookie with 2 or 3 pieces of toasted slivered almonds.
10. Bake in the center of the oven for 8-10 minutes, or until cookies are golden brown.
11. Transfer cookies to racks to cool.
12. Store in airtight containers for up to 3 days. The cookies can be frozen for up to 2 months.
